John arrives at the Atmosphere Plant to find a graveyard of workers. Using his mental breakthrough, he navigates the locks and opens the three great doors. He orders a survivor to restart the pumps before collapsing from exhaustion and hypoxia.
John Carter enters a graveyard of workers within the plant.
John Carter collapses on the floor as darkness/fade occurs.
Navigating locks, opening three doors, ordering pump restart, and collapsing.
